title: App versioning updates

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Important versioning info

You cannot create a new major version of your app if you already have a major version in draft status. Take a look at our documentation for more information about app versioning!

posts.author: greentoothbrush (ian ross)
posts.cookedHtml: The link needs to be updated to App versioning

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for letting us know! Should be updated
